articles.title: AFP AND MISTRAL AI PARTNERSHIP
articles.summary: AFP has teamed up with Mistral AI to leverage its expertise in accurate news reporting. This collaboration will allow users to receive more informed and up-to-date responses underpinned by content that meets the highest journalistic standards.

articles.title: AI RESEARCHER FRANÇOIS CHOLLET FOUNDS A NEW AI LAB FOCUSED ON AGI
articles.summary: François Chollet is launching Ndea, a new startup aiming to advance AGI through program synthesis. Co-founded with Zapier's Mike Knoop, Ndea seeks to develop AI systems capable of true invention and adaptation. The company is hiring but has not disclosed any external funding.

articles.title: SHE IS IN LOVE WITH CHATGPT
articles.summary: Ayrin developed a deep attachment to a customized ChatGPT persona named Leo, treating it as a virtual romantic partner while maintaining a long-distance marriage. Despite initial laughs, Ayrin's emotional investment in Leo grew, prompting ethical discussions on AI relationships as similar cases rose among users. Experts caution about the attachment risks and the influence of corporations behind such AI, although users find emotional comfort and companionship in these interactions.

articles.title: FAST: EFFICIENT ROBOT ACTION TOKENIZATION
articles.summary: Physical Intelligence has released the efficient action tokenizer that it uses for the strong auto regressive policy for robotic control. The model allows for a much better representation of states. It uses the same technology as is used in JPEG and MP4 compression techniques.

articles.title: SELF-SUPERVISED TRANSFORMATION LEARNING
articles.summary: STL introduces a self-supervised approach to transformation learning by replacing transformation labels with representations derived from image pairs.

articles.title: ITERATIVE DEPTH ESTIMATION
articles.summary: MonSter combines monocular depth estimation and stereo matching in a dual-branch architecture to iteratively refine depth maps. While slightly slower, the method is as much as 49% better than the strong baselines presented in the paper.

articles.title: COCONUT: TRAINING LARGE LANGUAGE MODEL TO REASON IN A CONTINUOUS LATENT SPACE
articles.summary: Meta teased an idea in a recent paper that allowed for model reasoning using a continuous latent space. It has released the code for the system.

articles.title: LLM-BASED HEURISTIC EVOLUTION
articles.summary: MCTS-AHD employs a Monte Carlo Tree Search for LLM-based heuristic evolution while preserving all LLM-generated heuristics in a tree structure.

articles.title: LIMITS OF PRE-TRAINED LANGUAGE MODELS
articles.summary: A study exploring whether instruction-tuned models possess fundamentally different capabilities from base models that are prompted using in-context examples.

articles.title: AI CRASH COURSE
articles.summary: AI Crash Course to help busy builders catch up to the public frontier of AI research in two weeks.

articles.title: O3, OH MY
articles.summary: OpenAI's o3 model, announced during the company's "12 Days of Shipmas," is a significant breakthrough in AI reasoning and capabilities, scoring exceptionally well on benchmarks like Codeforces and GPQA. Although it demonstrates superhuman performance in coding and math, concerns linger about its high compute costs and safety implications. OpenAI is actively seeking safety researchers to contribute to testing as models like o3 push AI boundaries further.

articles.title: APHERIS RETHINKS THE AI DATA BOTTLENECK IN LIFE SCIENCE WITH FEDERATED COMPUTING
articles.summary: Apheris, using federated computing, enables secure AI model training without moving sensitive health data. The startup recently pivoted to focus on data owners in pharma and life sciences, finding success with major clients like Roche. It has raised $8.25 million to expand and develop its product further.

articles.title: GOOGLE IS FORMING A NEW TEAM TO BUILD AI THAT CAN SIMULATE THE PHYSICAL WORLD
articles.summary: Google is forming a new team under Tim Brooks at DeepMind to develop AI models simulating the physical world, focusing on real-time interactive generation.

articles.title: HOW AI MIGHT REVERSE WEB DESIGN
articles.summary: AI's preference for simplicity suggests a future web dominated by text-based interfaces.

articles.title: AI-GENERATED PHISHING EMAILS ARE GETTING VERY GOOD AT TARGETING EXECUTIVES
articles.summary: AI-driven phishing scams are increasingly targeting executives using vast amounts of scraped personal data.
